codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers the feature requirements. Created secret_scanning.rs module with SecretScanner supporting both gitleaks and ggshield scanners. Pre-commit hook integration, staged change scanning, and commit blocking all implemented correctly. 16 unit tests cover core functionality.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation requires gitleaks or ggshield to be installed on the system, but AGENTS.md does not mention these as prerequisites. Workers implementing this feature would need to know to install these tools beforehand.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: SecretScannerError::ScannerNotFound variants mention 'gitleaks or ggshield' but there's no documentation on how to install them. Transcript shows worker discovered scanner availability via which::which() but didn't document installation instructions.

summary: Feature implementation passes review. SecretScanner provides gitleaks/ggshield integration with pre-commit hook installation, staged change scanning, and commit blocking. Code is well-structured with proper error handling and comprehensive test coverage.
